channel.title: GitHub AI Radar
channel.description: Daily AI involvement rankings for GitHub repositories

item.title: AI Radar Report — 2026-04-01
item.description:
📊 GitHub AI Radar — 2026-04-01 Repos analyzed: 20
Rank | Repository | AII | Commit AI | PR AI | Review AI -----|-----------|-----|-----------|-------|---------- #1 | thedotmack/claude-mem | 65.9% | 79/100 | 7/100 | 5/5 #2 | Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT | 33.4% | 36/100 | 0/100 | 50/93 #3 | hacksider/Deep-Live-Cam | 26.8% | 8/100 | 4/100 | 11/11 #4 | openclaw/openclaw | 24.8% | 0/100 | 9/100 | 391/396 #5 | ollama/ollama | 24.4% | 2/100 | 4/100 | 1/1 #6 | mem0ai/mem0 | 22.6% | 39/100 | 1/100 | 0/2 #7 | moeyui1/github-ai-detector | 20.6% | 1/43 | 0/9 | 2/2 #8 | FlowiseAI/Flowise | 16.8% | 19/100 | 10/100 | 0/33 #9 | open-webui/open-webui | 16.1% | 0/100 | 42/100 | 0/0 #10 | OpenHands/OpenHands | 13.7% | 1/100 | 36/100 | 0/23 #11 | huggingface/transformers | 12.5% | 10/100 | 17/100 | 0/58 #12 | HKUDS/nanobot | 6.8% | 4/100 | 6/100 | 0/7 #13 | rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch | 5.8% | 0/100 | 0/100 | 0/0 #14 | facebook/react | 5.7% | 1/100 | 4/100 | 0/2 #15 | ItzCrazyKns/Vane | 4.7% | 3/100 | 2/100 | 0/12 #16 | kamranahmedse/developer-roadmap | 3.6% | 1/100 | 11/100 | 0/0 #17 | Kong/kong | 2.8% | 0/100 | 2/100 | 0/0 #18 | jingyaogong/minimind | 1.8% | 0/100 | 0/81 | 0/0 #19 | torvalds/linux | 0.1% | 0/100 | 0/0 | 0/0 #20 | tensorflow/tensorflow | 0.1% | 0/100 | 0/100 | 0/3
